summary: Round-2 diff (7d3d6941..6b4145f0) is docs-only lineage/architecture updates plus a test-only CI fixture identity fix; no source changes. The fixture fix adds git identity config immediately after clone, before any commit, resolving the CI empty-ident failure without weakening assertions. Independent focused re-run under GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null passed 11/11 matching the head-bound integration record. RML-CONTRACT-001-005 remain covered; round-1 low findings carried over as followups.
